source_pr.title: executor: rewrite TestNotFillCacheFlag to avoid data race in CI
source_pr.body:
The old test use a user-defined client to check request, but data race is detected in  `checkRequestClient.notFillCache`
`checkRequestClient` is a global instance used by all goroutine, that's bad.

I rewrite this test case to use `CheckSelectRequestHook` so the CI could be more stable.

@XuHuaiyu @winkyao
